<QuestionSource url="https://www.cbp.gov/newsroom/stats/southwest-land-border-encounters">
## Summary of CBP Southwest Land Border Encounters Page

**Disclaimer:** The extracted content appears to be primarily the metadata, definitions, and explanatory notes from the CBP statistics page, rather than the actual encounter data/numbers themselves. The dashboard data (charts and figures) was not captured in the extraction, likely because it is rendered dynamically.

### Key Definitional and Methodological Information:

**What the data includes:**
- U.S. Border Patrol (USBP) **Title 8 Apprehensions** (physical control/detainment of persons between ports of entry not lawfully in the U.S.)
- Office of Field Operations (OFO) **Title 8 Inadmissibles** (individuals at ports of entry deemed inadmissible, including those seeking humanitarian protection)
- **Title 42 Expulsions** (individuals expelled under public health authority — applicable only from **March 21, 2020 to May 11, 2023**)

**Data quality notes:**
- Data is extracted from **live CBP systems** and is subject to change due to corrections, system changes, definitional changes, or pending reviews
- **Final statistics** are only available at the conclusion of each fiscal year
- A breakdown by USBP Sector and OFO Field Office is available via a separate "By Component" page
- Raw data is accessible through the **CBP Data Portal**

*No actual numerical encounter figures for any specific month were captured in this extraction.*
</QuestionSource>
